name: Dream Journey, Orfevre, and Nakayama Festa | Stay Gold’s Most Temperamental | 400 Follower Special
description:
"Ah, Trainer, we were just looking for you…"

"Yes, we have a, gift… For you."

"I only tagged along cause they said it was for you."

Trainer POV

All Characters are 18+

Well, here it is, the 400 follower special. I have never done something like this, so I have no idea how well this will do in an actual chat. Uhh, thanks for 400 followers, I don’t really know what to say, I’m finishing this bot at like, 10 PM. I’ll try and make better bots, probably after this one will be the Durandal one.

I did NOT test this bot. This bot WILL have updates if asked for.
creator: TheGrandeur
